title: Vendor-style normal IDMAC DMA mask/address translation proof
kernel_subject: mmc: test A733 vendor normal IDMAC address path
test_changes: Set normal IDMAC DMA/coherent mask to 64 bits for A733 before descriptor allocation.
Kept the vendor-style A733 descriptor geometry from H025/H026: size bits 12 and descriptor address shift 2.
Moved A733 normal-IDMAC descriptors to coherent allocation and skipped explicit descriptor dma_sync on that coherent path.
Logged DLBA programming, descriptor words, IDST, CHDA, CBDA, CBCR, BBCR, and the fabric snapshot at the forced CMD18.
key_evidence: Linux version 7.1.0-rc5-00282-g9c631195b663 booted on Machine model: Radxa Cubie A7S.
sunxi-mmc logged: diag h027 normal IDMAC DMA mask set to 64 bits coherent=0xffffffffffffffff dma_mask=0xffffffffffffffff.
sunxi-mmc logged coherent descriptor allocation: pages=2 size=8192.
The forced CMD18 descriptor launched with sg_dma=0x00000000fe100000, shift=2, DLBA=0x3f840000, descriptor d0={8000001c,00001000,407a3400,3f840004}.
After command launch, IDST remained 0x00004000, CHDA equaled DLBA, CBDA remained 0, CBCR remained 0x00000400, BBCR remained 0, and the descriptor checksum stayed 0x001bc28b.
The descriptor remained CPU-visible and unchanged after CPU-side sync.
interpretation: H027 closes the vendor-style normal IDMAC DMA mask/address hypothesis as a standalone fix. Matching the vendor normal-IDMAC 64-bit DMA mask, coherent descriptor allocation, size bits 12, and shifted DLBA path did not move SDMMC0 IDMAC past DESC_READ.
current_blocker: A733 SDMMC0 IDMAC descriptor-fetch reachability remains blocked below the standard SDMMC visible registers, tested descriptor geometry, tested DMA API/addressing variants, safe fabric-clock subset, and minimum NSI CCU bits.
operational_notes: Before H027 install, stale vendor-side SSH/sysfs activity left Cubie3 filesystem writes stuck; a Kasa power cycle restored vendor 5.15.147-21-a733 before artifacts were installed.
The /boot/cthu Image, DTB, config, and manifest were verified nonzero with matching SHA256 on Cubie3 before sync and boot.
Cubie3 was restored after the test and verified booted vendor kernel 5.15.147-21-a733.
next: Do not queue another descriptor-geometry or DMA-mask variant without new source evidence. H028 should inventory firmware handoff, secure monitor, boot0/ATF/SCP, and storage-master permission evidence for SDMMC/SMHC descriptor-fetch reachability, then prepare maintainer/vendor questions if no source-backed register exists.
